name: wandesk
description: An AI desktop and local workbench for agent-native apps.

scripts.dev: tsx scripts/start.ts en --force && AIOS_DEV_FRONTEND=1 tsx server/main/index.ts & tsx server/apps/index.ts & vite --config gui/vite.config.ts gui
scripts.dev:zh: tsx scripts/start.ts zh --force && AIOS_DEV_FRONTEND=1 tsx server/main/index.ts & tsx server/apps/index.ts & vite --config gui/vite.config.ts gui
scripts.build: tsx scripts/start.ts en --force && vite build --config gui/vite.config.ts gui
scripts.build:zh: tsx scripts/start.ts zh --force && vite build --config gui/vite.config.ts gui

author: Sider AI
